compiled_state.title: Review workflow: passing review with minor findings -> actionable findings silently dropped
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Bug Description

When a code review passes (all scores >= 4), agents proceed directly to commit without examining the individual findings. Minor and suggestion-severity findings that are actionable (e.g., wording inconsistencies, missing coverage, code quality improvements) are silently dropped.

## Expected Behavior

After a passing review, the orchestrator should inspect all findings. Actionable minor/suggestion findings should be recorded as bug tickets so they are tracked and addressed in a future session.

## Actual Behavior

The review workflow's 'After Review' section says: 'If ALL scores are 4, 5, or N/A AND no critical findings: Review passed. Immediately resume the calling workflow.' Agents follow this literally and never read the findings on a passing review, losing actionable improvement opportunities.

## Reproduction

1. Run /dso:commit or any workflow that triggers code review
2. Review passes with score 4+ but has minor findings
3. Observe that no bug tickets are created for the minor findings

## Proposed Fix

Add a post-pass step to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md that reads reviewer-findings.json on pass, filters for actionable minor/suggestion findings, and creates bug tickets for each.

comments.body: Known issue partial match: review gate requires reviewer-findings.json — related but different issue (this bug is about actionable findings being dropped on passing reviews, not about review gate blocking).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral (dual-signal: ticket describes agent behavior gap + affected file is workflow doc in docs/workflows/)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix applied: Added 'Post-pass findings inspection' step to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md pass-branch (between 'Review passed' and 'Emit review result event'). The step reads reviewer-findings.json, filters for actionable minor/suggestion findings, and creates bug tickets for each.
comments.author: Test
